scripts.image:check: bun run runner:stage && bun run image:check:staged
scripts.image:check:staged: wrangler deploy --dry-run && docker run --rm --entrypoint sh meanwhile-cloudflare-runtime:worker -c 'test -r /opt/meanwhile/licenses/LICENSE && test -r /opt/meanwhile/licenses/THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES && test "$(BUN_BE_BUN=1 meanwhile-runner --version)" = "$(cat /opt/meanwhile/metadata/BUN_VERSION)" && test "$(BUN_BE_BUN=1 meanwhile-demo-agent --version)" = "$(cat /opt/meanwhile/metadata/BUN_VERSION)" && test "$(claude-agent-acp --version)" = 0.58.1 && codex-acp --version | grep -F 1.1.2 >/dev/null && test "$(/opt/meanwhile/agents/node_modules/@openai/codex-linux-x64/vendor/x86_64-unknown-linux-musl/bin/codex --version)" = "codex-cli 0.144.3" && test "$(pi-runtime --version)" = 0.80.6'
